title: Legacy o3-mini-4D-tesseract import
summary: Imported the original pygame-based fork as the zero-point historical baseline before the new browser benchmark exists.

scientific_report.hypothesis: Preserve the original fork as a stable origin point before introducing the WebGPU/WASM benchmark.
scientific_report.method: Copy the fork into this repository, keep its source untouched under o3/archive, and register it as an archived baseline.
scientific_report.result_summary: The historical baseline now lives inside the benchmark repo with git history preserved at the repository level.
scientific_report.limitations: This import does not implement the new browser-native benchmark contract and is intentionally left unscored.
scientific_report.next_steps: Author the first WebGPU hypertesseract scene, capture browser/GPU conditions, and score it against the shared manifest.
